studio_laws_v3.law_01_no_mud: Surgical cut at 250Hz on ALL non-foundation elements. No exceptions.
studio_laws_v3.law_02_phase_is_god: Check phase correlation every 16 bars. Invert if correlation < 0.5.
studio_laws_v3.law_03_the_void_must_breathe: Layer 3 must have at least one parameter modulated by a slow Fractal-LFO.
studio_laws_v3.law_04_mono_sub: Everything below 120Hz must be 100% Mono. Stereo-bass is forbidden (unless G-Inverted).
studio_laws_v3.law_05_dynamic_headroom: Final pre-master peak must not exceed -6dB (Headroom for ASE-Mastering).
